def positive_correlation_id_recomputed_multiple_times_in_same_workflow():
    rule_id = "correlation_id_recomputed_multiple_times_in_same_workflow"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag code that regenerates correlation IDs instead of propagating one value."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
